title: Steven Weinberg: A Scientific Life
abstract: Steven Weinberg was a giant of late 20th Century physics on whose shoulders we stand while groping for the science of the 21st Century. This article provides a too-brief summary of a selection of his many achievements -- eight decades of superlative research, eight classic textbooks, eight best-selling forays into popular science writing and more.
comment: An abridged version of this article will appear in Biographical Memoirs of Fellows of the Royal Society. This version provides a lengthier description of a selection of his accomplishments and includes a number of quotations to give the reader a sense of his own voice
